TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-becenge_tagas

S.FORM: kay becenge ikay ki ngudradrekay yaie nitukucingalreane ka akaneane.
S.TRANSL: 小米對魯凱族來說是非常重要的食物。
The millet is a very important food to Rukai tribe.

S.FORM: asi luiya ta yaie.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼這麼說？
Why do (we) say that?

S.FORM: lu ka la e rigarigiane lay pathagili atisi si eape.
S.TRANSL: 春天的時候開始耕田與犁田。
(We) start farming in Spring.

S.FORM: lu ka la eapeane yaie la pangu e masingialalai la panguulrawlraw.
S.TRANSL: 當犁田的時候呢，就會讓人分工或請人幫忙。
When (we) are plowing, we divide the work to others or seek for others' helps.

S.FORM: matidadalame.
S.TRANSL: 很有趣。
(It is) very interesting

S.FORM: lu makaeape nga yaie lay ukalava ku alramuluane.
S.TRANSL: 犁完田後，等待播種。
After plowing, (you) wait for planting seeds.

S.FORM: lu makalramulu la ukalava adrangalruane ki adhadhame kudra kai ka akaneane kuini e umauma lini.
S.TRANSL: 若種子播下後，應該要等待並監視小鳥，別讓(它們)吃了他們這些農作物。
If the seeds are planted, (you) should wait and watch for birds in order not to (let them) eat their crops.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: lu talraeneme nga ka dramare yaie amani kudra takibecebecengeane.
S.TRANSL: 當六個月了的時候，到了小米的季節。
When it reaches six months, it is the millet season

S.FORM: lay masiasilange madu kibecenge si pavai ikay umauma.
S.TRANSL: 要同時收小米和曬(小米)。
(They) should reap the millet and put it under the sun.

S.FORM: lu ngukalra ku becenge pakubalriyu.
S.TRANSL: 如果拿很多小米，就會pakubalriyu
If (they) take much millet, they (will) do the pakubalriyu

S.FORM: la ikay ku lriku kuini ki puadaydayli nga kuini ki tasiameceane.
S.TRANSL: 有榮耀會給予背最遠的(男士們)
There is honor for (those) who carried things to the farthest.

S.FORM: lu tulrepenge kuini si sekete nga becenge yaie lay ukalava ki kalalrisiane.
S.TRANSL: 完成(前面的事)以後，就會把小米收藏起來等待豐收節。
Finishing this, (they) would save the millet and wait for the festival.

S.FORM: lu ka kalalrisiane lritubava sanaka nguakalra ku becenge makanaelre ku cekecekele kuini cekecekele kuini lu padulru ku bava yaie.
S.TRANSL: 到了豐年祭的時候，部落裡每家都一起收成很多小米，每一家都釀酒。
When (it is) the festival, every family in the tribe, taking a lot of millet together, will all make liquor.

S.FORM: talialalay la iluku ki e marudrange si la tucapicapili.
S.TRANSL: 頭目會帶領耆老(入場)，然後開始進行烤小米祈福。
The leader will lead the seniors, and then start to do the millet-baking ceremony.

S.FORM: lay mua ucaebe ku bece ku bava.
S.TRANSL: (頭目)去打開酒。
(the leader) is going to open the liquor.

S.FORM: waulebete amiakay ngudrekadrekay kudra nitaucaebeane kudra bava si kithiathingale ku malriw si malimeme.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族的開罈就是把酒打開，知道是酸的還是甜的。
The opening-jar in Rukai is that opening the liquor, and knowing whether the liquor is sour or sweet.

S.FORM: lay ka paasualalanga ki talialalay pau paungulu.
S.TRANSL: 讓頭目先喝。
Let the leader drink first.

S.FORM: lu ungulu ku talialalay alay paungulu ki kiacapili.
S.TRANSL: 頭目喝完後讓長老喝。
After leader finished the drinking, (they) let presbyter drink.

S.FORM: lay talela dreele ku mathaithariri nga ku bava si lri ka saarakayane kudra lu pucavili nga.
S.TRANSL: 然後頭目換位置去選最佳的酒，用在明年的儀式中。
Then the leader switch position select the best liquor and use it in the ceremony next year.

S.FORM: watangidrakalane kuini mathariri lakamani kudra thingathingale madu.
S.TRANSL: 豐收祭很好，所以要知道
tangidrakakalane is good, so (you) should know.

S.FORM: tapucavicavilane lu iyaane yaie wa drima ku cayli nay ka tangeatangea lamani tukucingale kay kalabecengeane.
S.TRANSL: 豐收祭告訴(我們)每個人年齡上的成長，所以很重要。
tapucavicavilane tells that everyone has gained their years, so it is important.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: niane.
S.TRANSL: 如此。
(it is) so.
